runtime_items.directive_summary: Consent Agenda items are presented for Council approval, with implementation by the City Manager or designee according to staff recommendations.
runtime_items.source_quote: Approval of the Consent Agenda authorizes the City Manager, or his designee, to implement each item in accordance with staff recommendations.

runtime_items.directive_summary: Council to adopt a resolution retaining Winstead, LLC as outside counsel for federal funding issues in an amount up to $100,000.00.

runtime_items.directive_summary: Council to adopt appropriation ordinances allocating $14,145,000.00 for specified capital projects and amend the fiscal year 2025 adopted budget and fiscal years 2025-2029 capital improvement program.

runtime_items.directive_summary: Council to authorize execution of Amendment No. 1 to the EMS interlocal agreement with MedStar Mobile Healthcare to extend the agreement end date to December 31, 2025.

PRESENTATIONS BY THE CITY COUNCIL

runtime_items.directive_summary: Council is considering adoption of an ordinance and resolution package for up to $6,500,000 in Series 2025 taxable combination tax and surplus revenue certificates of obligation for the Water Department lead service line replacement project, including sale to the Texas Water Development Board, a principal forgiveness agreement, related escrow agreement, and appropriation ordinances.
runtime_items.source_quote: Adopt Ordinance Authorizing Issuance of Series 2025 Taxable Combination Tax and Surplus Revenue Certificates of Obligation in an Aggregate Principal Amount Not to Exceed $6,500,000.00

runtime_items.directive_summary: Council is considering authorizing execution of an economic development program agreement with Alcon Research, Inc. or an affiliate for up to seven annual grants totaling no more than $6,000,000, subject to investment and employment commitments.
